3163370.name: Champion Simulator
3163370.description: Start by giving other boxers a taste of what it means to rise from the bottom to become the champion. In this CHAMPION SIMULATOR, you begin as a weaker boxer, training hard at home to build your strength and skills. As you progress, you'll step into street fights, where you can earn both money and respect. With your earnings, you’ll be able to upgrade your training by accessing a real gym, allowing you to see better results. Finally, with enough resources and determination, you can secure a pro card to enter official tournaments, aiming for the ultimate goal: becoming the CHAMPION!
3163370.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 简体中文, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 繁体中文, 日语, 韩语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 波兰语, 俄语, 土耳其语
